Hot Take
The Secret To My Great Marriage Isn't Communication. It's Contempt.

“After 13 years and four kids, I ditched the therapy-speak and "I" statements,” writes Alice A. Lemee. “Turns out, a little affectionate contempt goes a long way.”

Give this hot take a read.
